summary: Iteration 238 - Sentient Streamline Enhancement Testing Complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified. SuanpanPhysics.js exports getTieredFriction, getTieredTrailLength, calcPredictiveSnap, getBubbleExpandDuration. NebulaSphere.js accepts masteryTier prop and applies tiered friction + trail rendering. BubblePortal.js accepts masteryTier prop with data-testid='bubble-portal' and implements tiered expansion duration + Web Audio expansion tone. OrbitalNavigation.js wires masteryTier from SovereignContext to NebulaPlayground and BubblePortal. PhonicResonanceProvider renders inside OrbitalNavigation when token exists. usePhonicResonance hook implements route-based Web Audio frequencies (432Hz Spotless, 528Hz Enlightenment, 741Hz Tech/Dev, 396Hz Meditation, 852Hz Star Charts). App compiles without errors.

issues: Credits running low notification appears - expected behavior for test user

critical_code_review_comments: SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements TIER_FRICTION map (T0=0.970, T1=0.980, T2=0.988, T3=0.993, T4=0.997)
SuanpanPhysics.js correctly implements TIER_TRAIL_LENGTH map (T0=4, T1=6, T2=10, T3=16, T4=24 frames)
SuanpanPhysics.js exports getTieredFriction(masteryTier) returning friction coefficient
SuanpanPhysics.js exports getTieredTrailLength(masteryTier) returning trail frame count
SuanpanPhysics.js exports calcPredictiveSnap(spherePos, wellPos, wellRadius) returning {intensity, engaged, distance}
SuanpanPhysics.js exports getBubbleExpandDuration(masteryTier) returning 300ms→850ms based on tier
NebulaSphere.js accepts masteryTier prop (line 51) and initializes tieredFriction and trailLength (lines 69-70)
NebulaSphere.js applies tieredFriction to velocity damping (lines 133-134)
NebulaSphere.js records position history into trailRef.current (lines 141-142)
NebulaSphere.js renders luminous trail on canvas (lines 179-192)
NebulaSphere.js implements predictive snap haptics near gravity well (lines 145-151)
BubblePortal.js imports getBubbleExpandDuration from SuanpanPhysics (line 4)
BubblePortal.js implements playExpansionTone(masteryTier) Web Audio function (lines 18-72)
BubblePortal.js accepts masteryTier prop (line 135) and calculates expandDuration (line 141)
BubblePortal.js plays expansion tone on mount (line 147) with tiered haptic (lines 149-150)
BubblePortal.js uses tiered easing for clip-path animation (lines 184-187)
OrbitalNavigation.js imports usePhonicResonance hook (line 9)
OrbitalNavigation.js imports PhonicResonanceProvider wrapper (lines 14-17)
OrbitalNavigation.js gets masteryTier from useSovereign (line 22)
OrbitalNavigation.js passes masteryTier to NebulaPlayground (line 81) and BubblePortal (line 89)
OrbitalNavigation.js renders PhonicResonanceProvider when token exists (line 91)
usePhonicResonance.js implements ROUTE_FREQUENCIES map with Solfeggio frequencies
usePhonicResonance.js implements BINAURAL_OFFSET = 7Hz for theta wave entrainment
usePhonicResonance.js initializes Web Audio on first user click (browser autoplay policy)
usePhonicResonance.js transitions frequency smoothly on route change (2-second crossfade)
SovereignContext.js fetches masteryTier, gravityMultiplier, bloomMultiplier from /api/sovereign-mastery/status
NebulaPlayground.js passes masteryTier to NebulaSphere (line 267)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 238 verified the Sentient Streamline Enhancement system. Key components: (1) SuanpanPhysics.js exports 4 new functions: getTieredFriction, getTieredTrailLength, calcPredictiveSnap, getBubbleExpandDuration. (2) NebulaSphere.js accepts masteryTier prop and applies tiered friction (0.970-0.997), renders luminous trail (4-24 frames), and implements predictive snap haptics. (3) BubblePortal.js accepts masteryTier prop, uses tiered expansion duration (300-850ms), plays Web Audio expansion tone (2000Hz chime → 60Hz bass rumble), and applies tiered haptic patterns. (4) OrbitalNavigation.js wires masteryTier from SovereignContext to NebulaPlayground and BubblePortal, and renders PhonicResonanceProvider. (5) usePhonicResonance.js implements route-based ambient Web Audio with Solfeggio frequencies (432Hz Spotless, 528Hz Enlightenment, 741Hz Tech/Dev, 396Hz Meditation, 852Hz Star Charts, 639Hz Wellness, 963Hz Creative) and 7Hz binaural offset. Web Audio requires user interaction to initialize (browser autoplay policy). Test user grad_test_522@test.com is at Tier 1 (Novice/Seeker).
